name: Autel Intelligent Technology Corp., Ltd.
summary: Autel Intelligent Technology Corp., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, and servicing of automotive intelligent diagnostics equipment, detection and analysis systems, and automotive electronic components. It offers professional diagnostic tools, automotive tire pressure monitoring systems, ADAS series products for automotive intelligent assisted driving systems, and special and IMMO tools. The company also provides integrated intelligent maintenance cloud services; and diagnostic software. It primarily sells its products to approximately 50 countries and regions, including the United States, Germany, the United Kingdom, and Australia. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
